arts.ttl: Rodrygo: “I want to achieve more and more with the Real Madrid shirt”
arts.sum: It is a very special mark and I want to achieve more and more things with this shirt.” Rodrygo also talked about the season so far, but admitted he wants to do more.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Man City's chances of overturning Real Madrid first-leg deficit
arts.sum: Man City's chances of qualifying for the last 16 and the predicted winner of every Champions League play-off tie.

arts.ttl: Casemiro makes surprise admission on Man Utd career despite Real Madrid trophy successes
arts.sum: Casemiro has surprisingly named his debut season at Manchester United as the best of his career despite being a serial trophy winner during his spell at Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Papers: Man City to battle Real Madrid for £85m-rated Leverkusen midfielder Wirtz
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Tuesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Federico Valverde injury update ahead of Real Madrid vs Man City
arts.sum: An update on the wellbeing of Real Madrid star Federico Valverde has this evening been forthcoming online. This comes after the Uruguayan set alarm bells sounding across the Real fanbase…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-0 Rayo Vallecano: Player Ratings as Barca Overtake Real Madrid as La Liga Leaders
arts.sum: Barcelona took advantage of Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid dropping points to defeat Rayo Vallecano and go top of La Liga.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans continue to fume over officiating in Barcelona vs Real Valladolid
arts.sum: Fans of Real Madrid have on Monday taken to social media in their droves, to make clear once more their grievances with the standard of officiating in La Liga. This…

arts.ttl: 'Incredible': Jack Grealish says Liverpool have a player who is an absolutely amazing playmaker
Man City's lack of belief and ageing team exposed by ruthless Real Madrid
arts.sum: Manchester City's lack of belief and ageing squad is exposed by ruthless Real Madrid to leave their Champions League hopes in danger, writes BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty

arts.ttl: Manuel Akanji issues injury update as Man City defender shares photo after undergoing surgery
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Manuel Akanji takes to social media to confirm that he has undergone successful surgery on an abductor injury.
